# Summary

What this changes and why.

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] New behavior in io-guard / applier / loop-breaker has a unit test
- [ ] Change is surgical and focused
- [ ] No secrets or generated files committed

## Notes
Anything reviewers should know (trade-offs, follow-ups, manual testing done).
